source_summary: Users can manage email visibility with private and contacts-only modes, while support administrators retain investigation access.
assumptions: Visibility changes take effect immediately after the user saves the setting.
out_of_scope: Public profile visibility for email addresses

covered_behaviors: Default private visibility for new accounts
User control over supported visibility modes
UI explanation of the active mode
gaps: Audit logging requirements for administrator access are not specified.

acceptance_criteria.sentence: New accounts shall default email visibility to private.
A user shall be able to change email visibility between private and contacts-only.
Support administrators shall be able to view a user's email address during an investigation even when the user visibility setting is private.
The settings UI shall explain the currently selected email visibility mode.
